name: QA 1430
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1430

Do the default pmlogger config and pmlogger_daily_report

play well together?



Copyright (c) 2022 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce
